Package io.vertigo.core.lang

Class ClassSelector.ClassConditions

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.core.lang.ClassSelector.ClassConditions
Enclosing class:
ClassSelector
public static final class ClassSelector.ClassConditions extends Object
Utility class for class selection predicates.

    Method
    Description

    annotatedWith(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)
    Creates predicate for classes with specific annotation.

    Creates predicate for interface types.
    static Predicate<Class>
    isAbstract()
    Creates predicate for abstract classes (excluding interfaces).

    Creates predicate for classes extending or implementing a type.

    • annotatedWith

      public static Predicate<Class> annotatedWith(Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)
      Creates predicate for classes with specific annotation.

      Returns:
      Predicate for class selection

      public static Predicate<Class> subTypeOf(Class clazz)
      Creates predicate for classes extending or implementing a type.

      clazz - Base type to check
      Returns:
      Predicate for class selection
